hero.subtitle: Music quizzes, trivia, action games... Your customers scan a QR code and play from their phone. Zero setup, just a TV.

howItWorks.title: Ready in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No technical skills required
howItWorks.step1Desc: Plug a laptop into your TV via HDMI and open Unboared in the browser.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick a game from the catalog. A QR code appears on screen.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your customers scan the QR code and play from their phone. Let's go!

whyItWorks.title: Why it works
whyItWorks.subtitle: Entertainment that boosts your business
whyItWorks.b1Desc: A venue with entertainment draws 2x more people. Unboared gives them a reason to choose you over the competition.
whyItWorks.b2Desc: Customers who play come back. Leaderboards and competition keep them coming for more.
whyItWorks.b3Desc: The longer your customers stay, the more they spend. An Unboared night means +45min average time on site.

objections.title: Your questions, our answers
objections.a1: You don't need to be. If you can plug in an HDMI cable and open a browser, you can use Unboared. We have 60-year-old bar owners using it every night.
objections.q2: "I don't have time to host games"
objections.a2: Unboared runs itself. Launch a game, and your customers play together. You serve, they play. No microphone or host needed.
objections.a3: 110,000+ players and 500,000+ games played. Music quizzes and word games work every time. And everyone knows how to scan a QR code.

features.title: Why Unboared?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to level up your events
features.f1Desc: A browser and a TV, that's it. No app download needed for your customers.
features.f2Desc: From 2 to 200 simultaneous players. Nobody sits on the bench.
features.f3Desc: Add your own quizzes, choose your games, and personalize your venue name.
features.f4Desc: Ready in 2 minutes. No training, no technician. Just launch and play.
features.f5Desc: Track your stats in real time: players, sessions, favorite games.
features.f6Desc: Collect your customers' contact info in full GDPR compliance.

testimonials.t3Quote: Great nights, great vibe all together. It's on fire 🔥. Used at every Top Music event at the Zénith de Strasbourg.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Unboared
faqPage.q1: How long does it take to set up Unboared?
faqPage.a1: 2 minutes! Connect your laptop to a TV via HDMI, open your web browser to console.unboared.com, and you're good to go.
faqPage.q2: Do my customers need to download an app?
faqPage.a2: No app needed. Players simply scan the QR code with their phone camera and play directly in their browser.
faqPage.q3: How many players can play at the same time?
faqPage.a3: Most of our games support unlimited players. Some action games like Bomber Kitten are limited to 20 players for optimal experience.
faqPage.q4: Do I need a WiFi connection?
faqPage.a4: Players need an internet connection (WiFi or mobile data). The TV-connected computer also needs internet. Stable WiFi is recommended for the best experience.
faqPage.a5: Yes! You can create your own quizzes, choose music themes for the blind test, adjust the number of rounds, and much more.
faqPage.q6: How does the free trial work?
faqPage.a6: You get 14 days to try Unboared for free with access to all games and features. A credit card is required to start the trial, but you won't be charged until after the 14 days if you choose to continue.
faqPage.q7: Can I cancel at any time?
faqPage.a7: Yes, the subscription is commitment-free. You can cancel anytime from your dashboard or by contacting us via email.
faqPage.a8: A laptop (or desktop) with a modern web browser, an HDMI cable, and a TV. That's it!
faqPage.q9: Are the games available in multiple languages?
faqPage.a9: Games are currently available in French and English. We're working on adding more languages.
faqPage.a10: By email at contact@unboared.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.

demoModal.title: Better on a computer!
demoModal.description: The demo is designed for a main screen (TV or computer). Your phone will be used as a controller for players. Open the demo on a computer to get the full experience.
demoModal.emailLabel: Get the link by email to open it on your computer

aboutPage.title: About Unboared
aboutPage.subtitle: Interactive entertainment, simplified.
aboutPage.missionText: Make interactive entertainment accessible to every venue that welcomes the public. No expensive equipment, no dedicated host. A TV, a QR code, and your customers play.
aboutPage.storyText: Born in Lyon, Unboared started from a simple observation: existing entertainment solutions are too complex, too expensive, or too limited. We built a platform that lets any venue offer interactive games in minutes.
